brief_justification: Wrong answer (mixing console instead of recording booth) but applied sound theory-of-mind reasoning about Austin's knowledge state; Goes one level beyond surface by tracking Austin's mental model of headphone location; Implicit self-monitoring by tracing what Austin knows vs what happened; Mentions verification need by noting no confirmed knowledge transfer but doesn't check alternative possibilities; Presents conclusion confidently without acknowledging uncertainty about what Austin might have noticed; Acknowledges Mark's move but doesn't consider other locations Austin might check; Shows reasoning chain from headphone movements to Austin's knowledge state but misses the correct answer's derivation.
